title: Wall Street Has 10 Trillion-Dollar Stocks: Select Analysts See One Adding 64% Over the Next Year, With Another Projected to Crater by 95% - AOL.com
sentences: Wall Street Has 10 Trillion-Dollar Stocks: Select Analysts See One Adding 64% Over the Next Year, With Another Projected to Crater by 95% - AOL.com This article examines the divergent analyst opinions on two trillion-dollar companies: Nvidia and Tesla.

While one analyst predicts a 64% upside for Nvidia due to its leadership in AI infrastructure, another foresee a 95% crash for Tesla's stock, citing structural disadvantages, valuation concerns, and CEO Elon Musk's unfulfilled promises.
The piece highlights that only 10 U.S.-listed companies currently hold a market cap exceeding $1 trillion.
